title: Build Data Gaps page in Power BI following DQ_PAGE_GUIDE.md
description: Build the Data Gaps report page visuals in Power BI per DQ_PAGE_GUIDE.md. The underlying gold_data_gaps table, TMDL model entries, and coverage DAX measures all landed under task-001; only the report-page build remains. Originally tracked as inline subtask task-001-6 inside task-001, which was marked Finished while this item was still Pending — promoted to a standalone task by /health-check 2026-07-19 so it is visible to routing.
acceptanceCriteria: Data Gaps page exists in the Power BI report and follows the layout in DQ_PAGE_GUIDE.md.
Page renders against gold_data_gaps with the coverage-percentage measures created in task-001.
Erik confirms the visuals populate with real data (not blank/error states) after a pipeline run.
notes: PROMOTED by /health-check 2026-07-19 from task-001's legacy inline subtask array (id was task-001-6). task-001 remains Finished — its Claude-side deliverables (gold_data_gaps table, TMDL, DAX measures, guide) were all completed and verified; this was the human-owned tail.

Original note flagged this as an OPTIONAL ENHANCEMENT — treat as low priority, and feel free to close it as descoped rather than building it if the Data Gaps page no longer earns its place in the report.

STALENESS CHECK FIRST: this item was authored 2026-01-16. Confirm DQ_PAGE_GUIDE.md and the gold_data_gaps schema still match current reality before building — the gold layer has changed substantially since (tasks 022-031).
